compliment_text: Tuyo looks like a great company – the Tuyo card is such a clever and fun concept.
closer: Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have questions about anything. Always happy to help!
full_body:
Hello Alejandro,

Thanks for trying out Polymer! Tuyo looks like a great company – the Tuyo
card is such a clever and fun concept.

I saw that you've already saved your LinkedIn Company ID, so I went ahead
and verified your organization and enabled the LinkedIn integration for
you. There are a few settings you'll need to configure on LinkedIn's side
for the connection to work properly.

This article walks you through it:
https://help.polymer.co/en/articles/15293740-configure-linkedin-to-integrate-with-polymer

Please don't hesitate to reach out if you have questions about anything.
Always happy to help!

Best,
Jessica


Jessica Gertig
Polymer | polymer.co

closer: I'm happy to answer any questions you have!
full_body:
Hello,

Thanks for checking out Polymer! Mind Network looks like it has some
incredible solutions for data privacy and security.  Are you finding
everything you need to get the most out of Polymer?

I see you are quite active on X, so I thought I'd let you know we are
releasing an X Hiring integration soon.  Verified organizations on X will
be able to request the jobs be connected to their profile.  Would you like
me to let you know when that's fully live?

I'm happy to answer any questions you have!

Regards,

Jessica

soon to be released integration with X Hiring.  You can have your jobs
added to their job board, and if you are a Verified Organization you can
email and ask xhiringsupport@x.com to connect your jobs to your X profile.

Would you like me to let you know when it's released?  Otherwise are you
finding everything you need to get the most out of Polymer?

I'm happy to answer any questions you have!

Cheers,

Jessica
